name: Pi
project_binding_recipe: Bind the repo once, then explicitly expose each existing vault item the repo needs. HASP installs a generated Pi package under HASP_HOME and registers it in Pi's settings.json so Pi can call the brokered MCP tools without raw secret values in its config.
approval_path: Prefer hasp setup or hasp agent connect pi, then let the generated Pi package call the managed wrapper and use project/session or window grants inside the broker; hasp session grant-plaintext remains the operator path when plaintext is explicitly required.
safe_inject_path: Use hasp_run or hasp_inject through the Pi extension tools, preferably with named refs like @OPENAI_API_KEY instead of recalling secret_01 or revealing plaintext.
write_env_path: Use hasp write-env only for explicit convenience materialization after the operator approves that repo-visible destination.
